title: carya minima
intro: Carya minima, also known as the small hickory or dwarf shagbark hickory, is a small deciduous shrub native to the southeastern United States. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Carya minima include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and lower blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Carya minima can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
